action.reasoning: Observation: The environment is fragmented. `/usr/bin/python` (Python 3.10) has `h5py`, `VLABench`, and `mediapy`, but lacks `lerobot`. `/opt/py312/bin/python` has `lerobot` but lacks the others. Analysis: I can bridge this by running with the default `/usr/bin/python` and adding the Python 3.12 site-packages to `sys.path`. This allows importing `lerobot` while retaining access to all other pre-installed packages. Decision: I will write `train.py` and `predict.py` using this `sys.path` hack, run a 1-epoch training on 2 episodes to validate the pipeline, and submit an evaluation to establish a baseline and measure iteration time.
